events.payload:
**Arc**: The AI has finished surveying the Astro site structure, confirmed the mental-model chapter layout, and is presenting a four-section design for the LLM bundle feature before proceeding to implementation.

**Before**: At the end of the design proposal, the AI offered to write a named spec file — `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-30-llm-mental-models-bundle-design.md` — as a prerequisite step before implementation.

**Event (AI proposal — verbatim)**: "If this looks right I'll write the spec to `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-30-llm-mental-models-bundle-design.md` and proceed."

**Event (user response — verbatim)**: "这也需要用 spec 吗。。开干吧"

**Event classification**: negative-space

**After — concrete artifacts**: No spec file was written. AI proceeded directly to task creation (TaskCreate calls at T65-T72 creating Tasks #1-#4), then wrote `site/scripts/build-llm-bundle.mjs` (T92), edited `site/package.json` (T113), created `site/src/components/CopyLLMLink.astro` (T139), and edited `site/src/pages/[lang]/mm/index.astro` (T141, T143) — all without producing the spec document.

**Why this satisfies the criteria**: (a) The AI named a specific file path (`docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-30-llm-mental-models-bundle-design.md`) as the next concrete action, specific enough to be identified. (b) The user explicitly declined with "这也需要用 spec 吗。。开干吧" (Does this also need a spec.. just do it). (c) The subsequent work demonstrably followed a different axis — implementation began immediately via TaskCreate and file writes, with zero spec file produced.
